DataRequest.Name: Successful VPN Logon From Outside My Country
DataRequest.Description: Detects VPN logon from outside my country. My Country is set to "United States" and may need to be changed for outside United States deployments
DataRequest.DataSource: FortiGate via Syslog, FortiProxy via Syslog, Palo Alto PAN-OS via Syslog, Juniper JunOS via Syslog, Juniper SSLVPN via Syslog, Pulse Secure via Syslog, Hillstone Firewall via Syslog, Cisco ASA via Syslog, Microsoft Windows via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent, WatchGuard via Syslog, Sophos Firewall via Syslog, SonicOS via Syslog

SubPattern.name: VPNLoginOutside
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_VPNLogonSuccess,Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_VPNLogoff) AND srcGeoCountry NOT IN (Group@PH_COUNTRY_GROUP_MYHOME) AND eventType NOT IN ("ASA-713049-SiteToSite-VPN-Logon-success","FortiGate-ipsec-phase2-up")

DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Successful VPN login from $user at IP $srcIpAddr from outside my country
